title: BG Electrical Single Socket For TV or FM Co-Axial Aerial Connection, Antique Brass
features: SLEEK AND SLIM, ANTIQUE BRASS SINGLE CO-AXIAL SOCKET: With sleek and slim premium metal, softly rounded edges, colour matching screws, this socket offers a sleek and modern look

PART OF THE NEXUS METAL RANGE: From BG Electrical, has softly rounded corners, colour-matching screws and a slim profile – combining quality with modern elegance. A moisture gasket protects the metal edges from tarnishing. Ideal when using new plaster

IDEAL FOR DOMESTIC AND COMMERCIAL ENVIRONMENTS: Designed specifically for TV and radio signals, it ensures minimal signal loss and interference, providing a reliable connection for entertainment systems
EASY TO INSTALL: With screw connection and cord grip. Minimum mounting box depth 25mm
BG ELECTRICAL 25 YEARS MANUFACTURER'S WARRANTY: They guarantee against faulty materials and workmanship for 25 years – giving you total peace of mind
description: From the manufacturer BG Electrical Antique Brass Single Co-Axial Socket, Rounded Plate Used for TV or FM co-axial aerial connections This sleek and stylish antique brass single co-axial socket from the BG Electrical Nexus range at Luceco, is used for TV or FM co-axial connections. With its rounded edge finish, the antique brass wall plate with matching fixing screws, will seamlessly fit with any style or décor. More Information Triplex minimum mounting box depth 35mm Manufactured to BS 5733 Clean and modern design With antique brass colour matching fixing screws, the power socket has a clean and modern look, allowing it to complement your home and interiors. Stylish and sleek The wall plates have a fixed integrated plastic gasket to protect metal edges from moisture, so you won’t see any visible plastic around the switches.
